dashboard_recap.headline: MLB Daily Recap - May 06, 2026
dashboard_recap.article:
**DOMINANT PITCHING SHOWCASES ACROSS MLB**

A trio of pitchers stole the show on Tuesday, as they combined for 27 strikeouts and zero earned runs. Brandon Sproat led the way for the Milwaukee Brewers, striking out five in four innings of work. Meanwhile, Nathan Eovaldi of the Texas Rangers tossed eight scoreless frames, fanning eight batters to help his team secure a 6-1 win. Paul Skenes of the Pittsburgh Pirates was equally impressive, striking out seven over eight innings to secure a 1-0 shutout victory.

In a night filled with power hitting, Andy Pages stole the show for the Los Angeles Dodgers, hitting three home runs and driving in six runs in a 12-2 thrashing of the Houston Astros. Corey Seager also showed off his power, hitting a home run and driving in two runs for the Texas Rangers in their 6-1 win over the New York Yankees.

Other notable performances came from Julio Rodríguez, who hit a home run and drove in a run for the Seattle Mariners in their 3-1 win over the Atlanta Braves. CJ Abrams also had a big night for the Washington Nationals, hitting three hits, including a home run, and driving in five runs in a 15-2 blowout of the Minnesota Twins.
